description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, averaging 58 mins per day. His work spanned five projects and was mostly in Java (42%), with Bash (18%), Python (14%), and Markdown (14%) also making up part of the time. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
